creator: understudy@understudy.net
text:
Krusader Versin 2.4.0-beta3 using KDE development platform 4.9.5 is missing the minimize icon when used in windowmaker-0.95.4  GNUstep-compliant NeXTstep window manager clone.

There should be in the left hand side of the top bar a square icon that can be used to minimize krusader.

How-To-Repeat: Open krusader
